pros: Super clean, quiet environment. The owner is very responsible and replies fast. Location is literally 5 minutes on foot to UTM main gate — perfect for early morning lectures.
cons: The kitchen is a bit small but manageable for one person.

pros: Good value for money. Wi-Fi is fast enough for online classes and Zoom meetings. Neighbours are mostly students so it's generally quiet.
cons: Air-conditioning unit is a bit old and can be noisy at night. Parking can be a bit tight on weekends.

pros: Stayed here for 6 months. Would recommend to any UTM student. Owner is fair, never raised rent without proper notice. Washing machine in good condition.
cons: No covered parking but there's street parking available.

pros: Private bathroom is a huge plus. The house is modern and clean. Good for someone who values privacy.
cons: A bit far from campus — need to own a motorcycle or car. Price is on the higher end for a student budget.

pros: Clean place. Owner stays on-site so maintenance requests are handled quickly.
cons: Strict house rules — no visitors after 10 PM. The kitchen is shared with the owner so meal preparation time can clash.

pros: Incredibly affordable, walking distance to UTM. My housemates are great people. Internet is included in rent which is a bonus.
cons: Basic furnishings — don't expect a luxury room. The wardrobe is small.

pros: Amazing studio apartment with an incredible view of Skudai. Gym and pool access made life so comfortable. Worth the price for postgraduate students on scholarship.
cons: A bit far from UTM but traffic is manageable. Parking costs extra (RM50/month).

pros: Great if you have a group of friends to split the rent. Very spacious, backyard is a bonus for barbecue sessions. Landlord is flexible with lease terms.
cons: House is a bit old — some of the fixtures need replacement. No public transport nearby, must have own vehicle.
